summary: Public posts claim Chiang Mai smoke worsened on 2026-03-19 due to nearby burning.
statement: Public discussion asserts that smoke in Chiang Mai worsened on 2026-03-19 and attributes the episode to nearby or upwind burning.
meaning: This claim captures the dominant public attribution narrative worth testing against physical evidence.
selection_reason: Merged duplicate public posts into one retained smoke-attribution claim.

compact_audit.coverage_summary: The compact view keeps the dominant attribution cluster and preserves the main source channels.
sampling_notes: Top titles were deduplicated by semantic fingerprint before compaction.
